FAMILIAR_STATUE_RELIC.title: Familiar Statue
FAMILIAR_STATUE_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, all enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
FAMILIAR_STATUE_RELIC.flavor: A familiar face, a different air. Perhaps you have seen this person before?
SWORD_HAMMER_RELIC.title: "Sword Hammer"
SWORD_HAMMER_RELIC.description: All cards that cost [blue]0[/blue] cost [blue]1[/blue] more and replay [blue]1[/blue] time.
SWORD_HAMMER_RELIC.flavor: A sword stuck in a huge stone. Who had the time for this?
BROKEN_SWORD_RELIC.title: "Broken Sword"
BROKEN_SWORD_RELIC.description: All cards that cost [blue]2[/blue] or more cost [blue]1[/blue] less and [red]Exhaust[/red] after being played.
BROKEN_SWORD_RELIC.flavor: A broken sword. Usable enough... probably...
FLOWER_OF_CANDE_RELIC.title: The Flower of Cande
FLOWER_OF_CANDE_RELIC.description: At the start of your turn, heal [blue]1[/blue] HP.
FLOWER_OF_CANDE_RELIC.flavor: An epic carved into stone, left by a famous Gaulish poet eight hundred years ago.
OLD_GAULISH_PLACE_NAMES_RELIC.title: On Old Gaulish Place Names
OLD_GAULISH_PLACE_NAMES_RELIC.descriptio: At the start of combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Regen[/gold].
OLD_GAULISH_PLACE_NAMES_RELIC.flavor: An old book on place-name history Popukar found in the Doctor's office. It records Clebrasson.
RHODES_DOOR_RELIC.title: Rhodes Door
RHODES_DOOR_RELIC.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strike[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Defend[/gold] to your deck. At the end of combat, upgrade the last card you played this combat.
RHODES_DOOR_RELIC.flavor: This modified "door" binds two stories tightly together. Beyond it lies Rhodesdale, a haven for Sarkaz and the Infected.
NUMBNESS_AND_VULGARITY_RELIC.title: Numbness and Vulgarity
NUMBNESS_AND_VULGARITY_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
NUMBNESS_AND_VULGARITY_RELIC.flavor: A famous artwork, the final piece of a mad Leithanian sculptor from two hundred years ago.
PROPHECY_PROJECTION_RELIC.title: Prophecy Projection
PROPHECY_PROJECTION_RELIC.flavor: You must have heard these words: "I see you, black crown upon your head, boiling countless lives into memories..."
An additional minion enemy that appears in every combat. It inherits the HP it had at the end of the previous combat. When defeated, it drops [blue]2[/blue] random relics and the [gold]Endless Key[/gold].
ENDLESS_KEY_RELIC.title: Endless Key
ENDLESS_KEY_RELIC.flavor: Through your wellspring inspiration, a story is born from nothingness; through your exhausted imagination, Amiya will bring all things to an end. Can your thoughts become a weapon against her?
DIMENSIONAL_FLUID_RELIC.title: Dimensional Fluid
DIMENSIONAL_FLUID_RELIC.flavor: A core material produced by combining technologies from many nations and deeply researching collapsed entities and the icefield megastructure. After you passed the trial, that Rhodes Island operator formally entrusted it to you and left a warning: "Take it safely to the end of the icefield. Kal'tsit is waiting there."
TIME_AND_LIGHT_RELIC.title: Time and Light
TIME_AND_LIGHT_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. [red]Let exploration open onto another direction.[/red]
TIME_AND_LIGHT_RELIC.flavor: The first mad howl that awakened the Law.
PROPHET_HORN_RELIC.title: Prophet's Horn
PROPHET_HORN_RELIC.description: When you enter Act 3, all paths converge toward a special [sine][purple]Secret Realm[/purple][/sine] node.
PROPHET_HORN_RELIC.flavor: It was not guns that conquered the people of gods and the ancient ones, but the Law. Soon, the meaning of "Teekaz" surpassed race, and Kazdel became a home for all.
PETAL_RELIC.title: Petal
PETAL_RELIC.description: Refresh a special [red]combat node[/red] in Act 3.
ANASA_KARMA_RELIC.title: Anasa Karma
ANASA_KARMA_RELIC.flavor: His heart has changed and his sword has shattered, but the crystals on his body remind him at every moment that his cultivation is not yet complete.
BISHOP_RESEARCH_RELIC.title: Bishop's Research
BISHOP_RESEARCH_RELIC.flavor: Nearly all of this Bishop's lifelong research remains in these files and notes, including many experiments that transgress ethics and morality. In his view, contact with the Seaborn was only a means. The final vision was for humanity to fuse with the Seaborn and evolve into stronger beings.
DEEP_BLUE_MEMORY_RELIC.title: Deep Blue Memory
DEEP_BLUE_MEMORY_RELIC.flavor: Even the smallest memory of the laboratory's research is enough to frighten you. Perhaps in that era, in order to survive, you and those who shared your identity once did things that could never be forgiven.
DETERMINATION_RELIC.title: "Determination"
DETERMINATION_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards each turn.
DETERMINATION_RELIC.flavor: Even now, Mizuki's human brilliance has not faded. As a human, he accepted the Seaborn; by the Seaborn, he will surely become human once more.
OBSERVATION_RELIC.title: "Observation"
OBSERVATION_RELIC.flavor: Mizuki's understanding of himself does not lean toward either Seaborn or human. He simply does what he believes is right.
HESITATION_RELIC.title: "Hesitation"
HESITATION_RELIC.flavor: A concrete form of Mizuki's self-doubt after his Seaborn instinct overwhelms his humanity. As long as this identity remains unclear, it will continue to harm him.
ROLLING_ANCESTORS_RELIC.title: Rolling Ancestors
ROLLING_ANCESTORS_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
ROLLING_ANCESTORS_RELIC.flavor: Oh no, the ancestors are here. They want to experience something even more thrilling...
